title: crotalaria cordata
intro: Crotalaria cordata, also known as the Narrowleaf rattlebox, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and roots of Crotalaria cordata are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its expectorant and antiseptic properties.
